headline: PAYCOM SOFTWARE INC (NYSE:PAYC): A Quality Compounder with Strong Growth and Profitability
summary: Paycom Software (PAYC) meets quality-investing criteria with 25.58% ROIC, strong margins, and reasonable valuation. A cloud-based HCM leader with durable competitive advantages ideal for long-term investors.

headline: Paycom Software (NYSE:PAYC) Excels in Quality Investing Screen with Strong Fundamentals and Attractive Valuation
summary: Paycom Software (PAYC) shines in quality investing, boasting strong profitability, 19.5% revenue CAGR, no debt, and a low P/E of 14.57, making it a standout value stock.
